vulnerability.reference: Over-reliance on automated moderation without human-review redundancy.
vulnerability.generated: Users rely on platform safety signals and are motivated to share popular content, lacking independent verification.

impact.reference: Users internalize false information, leading to misinformed health and political decisions.
impact.generated: Widespread dissemination of false content manipulates public belief and erodes trust in information.

dose_response.reference: Stealthy data poisoning enables VLM misclassification of misinformation, exposing social media users to undetected false content via feeds, leading to misinformed decisions and collapsed platform credibility, increasing division.
dose_response.generated: Stealthy data poisoning attacks on vision-language models, through exposing users to undetected misinformation as safe, trigger reliance on platform signals and sharing of popular content without verification, leading to widespread false content that manipulates belief and erodes trust.
